notes: PHANTOM wordmark now uses the Audiowide display font in a teal->magenta neon gradient, applied uniformly to every brand wordmark: the boot-screen logo (.boot-logo), the in-app header logo (.app-logo), and the ENTER PHANTOM button label (.boot-cosmic .cosmic-btn). The font is embedded as a base64 woff2 @font-face ('PhantomBrand', ~13KB) routed through a new --brand CSS var, so it stays zero-network / fully offline — no CDN. --orb is left untouched (still drives section headers etc.), and the monospace/terminal doc-IDs and printed reports are intentionally NOT changed. .app-logo switched from a violet text-shadow to a clipped gradient + drop-shadow glow so the glow renders on the gradient text. boot-logo gradient retuned cyan/violet -> teal/magenta and signalLock tracking tightened for the wider face. This is a wordmark/font change only; the boot-screen visual redesign (row icons, glowing panels, pitch-black, ENTER treatment) is a separate pass.
